title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: tools/__init__.py (第 1 至 49 行，共 49 行) ---
   1 | # tools/__init__.py
   2 | from .bash_tool import BashTool
   3 | from .file_tool import ReadTool, FileEditTool, FileTreeTool, WriteFullFileTool
   4 | from .plan_tool import UpdatePlanTool, MarkDoneTool
   5 | from .session_tool import SessionCleanerTool
   6 | from .pytest_tool import PytestTool
   7 | from .search_tool import SearchTool
   8 | from .symbol_tool import ListSymbolsTool, FindSymbolTool
   9 | from .git_tool import GitStatusTool, GitCommitTool, GitRollbackTool
  10 | from .memory_tool import MemorySaveTool, MemoryRecallTool, MemoryFileHistoryTool, MemoryErrorHistoryTool, MemoryStatsTool
  11 | 
  12 | def get_default_tools(plan_manager=None, memory_manager=None, memory_storage_dir="memory/long_term"):
  13 |     shared_memory_manager = memory_manager
  14 |     memory_save_tool = MemorySaveTool(memory_manager=shared_memory_manager, long_term_storage_dir=memory_storage_dir)
  15 |     shared_memory_manager = memory_save_tool.memory_manager
  16 |     memory_recall_tool = MemoryRecallTool(memory_manager=shared_memory_manager)
  17 |     memory_file_history_tool = MemoryFileHistoryTool(memory_manager=shared_memory_manager)
  18 |     memory_error_history_tool = MemoryErrorHistoryTool(memory_manager=shared_memory_manager)
  19 |     memory_stats_tool = MemoryStatsTool(memory_manager=shared_memory_manager)
  20 | 
  21 |     tools = [
  22 |         BashTool(),
  23 |         ReadTool(),
  24 |         FileEditTool(),
  25 |         WriteFullFileTool(),  # 新增：全量写入工具
  26 |         FileTreeTool(),
  27 |         SearchTool(),  # 新增：代码搜索工具
  28 |         ListSymbolsTool(),  # 新增：符号索引工具
  29 |         FindSymbolTool(),  # 新增：符号查找工具
  30 |         PytestTool(),
  31 |         SessionCleanerTool(),
  32 |         # Git 自动化工具
  33 |         GitStatusTool(),
  34 |         GitCommitTool(),
  35 |         GitRollbackTool(),
  36 |         # 长期记忆工具
  37 |         memory_save_tool,
  38 |         memory_recall_tool,
  39 |         memory_file_history_tool,
  40 |         memory_error_history_tool,
  41 |         memory_stats_tool
  42 |     ]
  43 | 
  44 |     # 如果提供了管家，就加载规划工具
  45 |     if plan_manager:
  46 |         tools.append(UpdatePlanTool(plan_manager))
  47 |         tools.append(MarkDoneTool(plan_manager))  # 新增：标记完成工具
  48 | 
  49 |     return tools
--- 读取完毕 ---
